use_codes.desc: METHOD OF TREATING INFLAMMATORY INTESTINAL DISEASES

indications.text:
DIPENTUM is indicated for the maintenance of remission of ulcerative colitis in adult
patients who are intolerant of sulfasalazine.

who are intolerant of sulfasalazine.

are intolerant of sulfasalazine.
